CREATE TABLE test_xml (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data XML);
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, data) VALUES (1, xml_tree_doc('1'));
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, data) VALUES (2, xml_tree_doc('2Nested 3'));
SELECT xml_tree_doc((SELECT data FROM test_xml WHERE id = 1));
SELECT xml_tree_doc('' || (SELECT data FROM test_xml WHERE id = 2) || '') AS xml_result;
WITH xml_data AS (SELECT xml_tree_doc(data) AS doc FROM test_xml) SELECT * FROM xml_data WHERE doc IS NOT NULL;
